● Update(~/.claude/settings.json)

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Edit file
 ../../../.claude/settings.json
 This will modify /home/ubuntu/.dotfiles/scripts/claude_settings.json (outside working directory) via a symlink
